plugins.description: Ars Nova Claude Plugin — Season PM / Dashboard Connector, per-person Project Secretary, Task Runner (execute a season task end-to-end), and SOP Writer (capture how-we-do-things into the Operations SOP Library), plus future Ars Nova skills and MCP connectors.
